data.title: Add eval test case for brainstorm convert-to-epic behavior
data.description:
Add test case to plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml for convert-to-epic path.

TDD: test-exempt: static config (unit exemption criterion 3).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] promptfooconfig.yaml contains convert-to-epic test case
  Verify: grep -q 'convert.*epic\|superseded' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Eval config is valid YAML
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml'))"
